weapons.name: Wooden Staff
weapons.flavor: A branch from a tree that has touched the Source. It strikes the spirit, not the flesh.
weapons.forge: Cut a living branch, strip it bare, and speak your true name into the wood.

weapons.name: Ironwood Stave
weapons.flavor: The same branch, hardened by your grip and your first victory.
weapons.forge: Forge using Giza Iron Ore to harden your staff.

weapons.name: Bronze Cudgel
weapons.flavor: Heavier, surer - it bites deeper into the dark.
weapons.forge: Forge using St. Louis Copper Sheets to cast a bronze edge.

weapons.name: Iron Blade
weapons.flavor: A true edge now. It cuts what binds a soul, never what breathes.
weapons.forge: Tempered at the anvil using both Giza Iron and St. Louis Copper.

weapons.name: Sword of Light
weapons.flavor: A blade of pure conviction. The dark cannot abide its edge.
weapons.forge: Ignite the ultimate steel at the anvil using Cosmic Shards from the Emerald Halls.

consumables.name: Vigor Draught
consumables.desc: Herbs steeped in hut-spring water. Steadies the body before the road.

consumables.name: Fairgrounds Tonic
consumables.desc: A pale distillate - memory of the ivory city in a swallow.

consumables.name: Ward Balm
consumables.desc: Giza iron dust in copper oil. Truth rubs it on wandering souls before hard gates.

consumables.name: Strike Unguent
consumables.desc: Edge-oil for the weapon hand. The next fight bites deeper.

consumables.name: Cosmic Ember
consumables.desc: A dissolved shard from the Emerald road - fire and renewal in one sip.

destinations.name: Eden - Before the Fall
destinations.quote: The garden remembers every hand that tended it.

destinations.name: St. Louis, 1904
destinations.quote: The ivory city shines brightest for those who look twice.

destinations.name: The Kolbrin Vault
destinations.quote: What was buried was not destroyed.

destinations.name: The Emerald Halls
destinations.quote: As above, so below - as within, so without.
